---
name: New Platform Template
about: Request or contribute a template for a new platform
title: "[PLATFORM] "
labels: platform
---

**Platform name**
E.g. Vue3, Rust backend, Kotlin Multiplatform

**Build system / detection file**
What file(s) indicate this platform? E.g. `vue.config.js`, `Cargo.toml`

**Key rules specific to this platform**
What unique rules should the template include?

**Willing to contribute?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR with the template
- [ ] I can help test a template
- [ ] Just requesting, can't contribute
